sections.PROJECTS:
Full Stack Real-Time Chat App (MERN) | MERN, Socket.io, JWT, Tailwind, DaisyUI, Zustand
- Developed a real-time chat application using MERN Stack with Socket.io for live messaging.
- Implemented JWT authentication authorization with secure user access.
- Added online user status tracking and built responsive UI using Tailwind CSS + DaisyUI.
- Managed global state efficiently using Zustand.
SentriFusion - Multimodal Smart Surveillance System | Raspberry Pi, Python, TFLite, Streamlit
- Built an AI-based security system combining video object detection and audio anomaly detection for real-time threat identification.
- Deployed TensorFlow Lite models on Raspberry Pi for fast offline inference, reducing false positives and improving reliability.
- Developed a Streamlit monitoring dashboard with automated alerts, event snapshots, and detailed logs.
- Improved detection accuracy and minimized false alarms for scalable and cost-effective surveillance.
Explainable Scenario-Based Crop Yield Forecasting System | Python, LightGBM, SHAP, FastAPI, Streamlit
- Built an end-to-end crop yield forecasting system using NDVI, climate, soil, and historical yield data.
- Developed production-grade ML pipelines with validation, versioning, and consistent training-inference flow.
- Implemented LightGBM-based ensemble modeling with deployable inference.
- Integrated scenario testing and SHAP explainability for robust and interpretable predictions.
